title: OsianViwe Hotel Management System
shortDescription: A scalable backend for an e-commerce platform using microservices architecture.
fullDescription: I’m excited to share my full-stack project, OsianView Hotel — a complete hotel booking web application with a dedicated admin dashboard. This project includes user authentication, hotel room booking, service browsing, and booking management on the client side, while the admin panel enables adding and editing rooms as well as managing customer bookings. Through this project, I gained hands-on experience in full-stack development, particularly in building a secure backend, integrating it with a dynamic React frontend, implementing authentication, and managing real-world booking workflows. 🧑‍💻

title: Billing web application
shortDescription: I’m excited to share my second full-stack test project, a Billing Web Application developed for a real-world retail client. This project helped me gain hands-on experience with AWS, backend APIs, and dynamic frontend development.
fullDescription: I’m excited to share my second full-stack test project, a Billing Web Application developed for a real-world retail client. This project features category and product management, image upload and handling using AWS and local file systems, REST APIs built with Spring Boot, and a dynamic user interface developed with React and Bootstrap, including real-time updates along with search and delete functionality. Through this experience, I gained hands-on exposure to AWS, backend API development, and modern frontend practices, while also improving my self-learning skills and deepening my understanding of building scalable, real-world applications and integrating backend systems with cloud-based file handling. 🧑‍💻
